text:
I bought under 1.5 for Croatia - Ghana AFTER Ghana scored the 1-1.

Referee was called to VAR monitor, which means it will be disallowed many times. Unfortunately it didn’t and I lost 60$ :) https://t.co/3cRNomRYYi

Naomi Osaka retired in her match against Muchova today.🎾

In 2 days, she plays her first game of Wimbledon, with the odds priced at 85c.💰

If she doesn't play, the match will resolve 50/50, so I bought a few shares of her opponent at 14c. If she does withdraw, I make a 3.5X.⚖️

Is she actually injured or is she just saving her energy for Wimbledon?

I am up $1013 this week so I bought my girlfriend a little gift🎁

I love Polymarket! https://t.co/SoKShXONCL

These charts are the beauty of shorting high FDV shitcoins.💎

Knocked out in group stage? Cry✅
Knocked out in any of knockout stage? Cry✅
Win the final? Cry✅

It will be his last World Cup. Ofcourse he will cry🤷‍♂️ https://t.co/LGj8PRcwqa

This is how quick leverage plays can turn around.

$SLX being scam pumped a week before the second airdrop unlock, which will inevitably make the price dump.📉

Luckily I don't overleverage and have a lot more room for pumps without being liquidated. Meanwhile I am farming some funding fees :)

I ended up with 10k shares for no player to break the goalscoring record.💰

Somehow someone thought that FV was 22c, way above my FV of a little below 10%. I got filled some at 78c.🟢

Unfortunately my avg is 94.8, but I am still not worried. This record has not been broken since 1958 and 14 goals is still a long long way to go.❌

I bought draw Y 89th minute for 77.5c🔥

I couldn’t pass on it. Obviously both teams were pressing hard, but 77.5 is crazy.

Obviously not that big of size but fun lil trade :) https://t.co/JpeABrnX2C

Mispricing on WC odds⁉️

Odds on Polymarket: 86%🔴
Odds on simulator based on 10k sims: 97%🟢

The model predicts that even if Australia stays at 3 points, they will still have a 50% chance of clarifying (through third place)

They still play USA and Paraguay. USA should be an L and Paraguay should be a W.

Let's see!

I feel like more and more clueless traders are joining Polymarket.

Win a trade = they made a good trade
Lose a trade = it's either Polymarket's fault or UMA's fault. No inbetween.

This loser mentality will not get you anywhere. Accept the loss and move on. These people are really stretching it and it's becoming really annoying.

Atleast these kind of traders provide easy bonds a lot of times

Placed this one last-minute but I feel like these odds are way too high?⁉️

South Africa played horrible in their first match against Mexico and got 2 red cards. So they are now missing 2 first-team players.🔴

I feel like it will be 2-0 or even 3-0. Lil sidebet: Hlozek to score. https://t.co/DgXNvDFx5C
I guess mine is not that interesting lol :) https://t.co/wczSfR8KTV
